description_long: This is a futuristic, angular electric car with a distinctive wedge-shaped body and a matte black finish on the roof and rear. The sides are adorned with bold graphics, including the text 'TRD' and '911', as well as stylized stripes in orange, red, and yellow. The vehicle features large, rugged wheels with visible treads, suggesting off-road capability. The windows are tinted dark, and the front end has a minimalist design with narrow, horizontal headlights and a sloped hood. The rear is flat and features a ribbed texture, while the overall design is reminiscent of the Tesla Cybertruck with custom livery. The car appears to be constructed primarily from metal and glass, with rubber tires and some plastic trim.
description: A wedge-shaped, matte black electric car with bold TRD and 911 graphics, rugged wheels, and a futuristic, angular design. The body features tinted windows, narrow headlights, and a ribbed rear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped hood, narrow headlights, and prominent TRD and 911 graphics on the front fascia.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angular body, large rugged wheels, tinted windows, and the full TRD livery with orange and red stripes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the ribbed black tailgate, rear TRD graphics, and the flat, minimalist rear design.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the same angular lines, rugged wheels, and TRD/911 graphics.
